codes.term: Hemolytic anemia with emphysema AND cutis laxa (disorder)
codes.rationale: Hemolytic anemia with emphysema and cutis laxa is a rare genetic syndrome, not a manifestation of primary COPD.
Congenital emphysema is a distinct congenital condition, not a manifestation of primary COPD.
Congenital lobar emphysema is a distinct congenital condition, not a manifestation of primary COPD.

codes.term: Bronchial atresia with segmental pulmonary emphysema (disorder)
codes.rationale: Bronchial atresia with segmental pulmonary emphysema is a congenital condition, not a manifestation of primary COPD.

codes.term: Congenital lobar emphysema of bilateral lungs (disorder)
codes.rationale: Congenital lobar emphysema is a congenital condition distinct from acquired COPD and should not be included in a primary COPD list.
Catarrhal bronchitis is a non-obstructive form of chronic bronchitis and does not confirm COPD (which requires airflow obstruction).
Panacinar emphysema is a pathological subtype that may be associated with COPD but could represent a distinct condition; clinical context needed.
Occupational bronchitis may be a subtype or cause of COPD but could also be a distinct occupational disease; clinical context needed.
Centriacinar emphysema is a pathological subtype that may be associated with COPD but could represent a distinct condition; clinical context needed.

codes.term: Pulmonary emphysema co-occurrent with fibrosis of lung (disorder)
codes.rationale: Pulmonary emphysema with lung fibrosis may represent COPD with comorbid pulmonary fibrosis or a distinct condition; clinical context needed.
Chronic emphysema caused by vapor is a specific etiology; unclear if this represents primary COPD or a distinct occupational/environmental condition.
Paraseptal emphysema is a pathological subtype that may be associated with COPD but could also be a distinct condition; clinical context needed.

summary: Recall: 69.6% (39 of 56 reference codes retrieved). Precision: 86.7%. F1: 77.2%. 6 reference codes were incorrectly excluded.

scored_codes.term: Other chronic obstructive pulmonary disease
scored_codes.rationale: This is the primary ICD-10 code for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease, directly matching the query.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease with acute lower respiratory infection
scored_codes.rationale: This is a clinically relevant subtype of COPD with acute lower respiratory infection, a direct manifestation of the condition.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease with acute exacerbation, unspecified
scored_codes.rationale: This represents acute exacerbation of COPD, a direct manifestation and complication of the primary condition.

scored_codes.term: Other specified chronic obstructive pulmonary disease
scored_codes.rationale: This is a specified variant of COPD and should be included as a clinical subtype.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease, unspecified
scored_codes.rationale: This is the unspecified COPD code, representing the condition when specific subtype is not documented.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive lung disease (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Chronic obstructive lung disease is a direct synonym for COPD and a primary diagnostic code.

scored_codes.term: Acute exacerbation of chronic obstructive airways disease (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Acute exacerbation of chronic obstructive airways disease is a direct manifestation of COPD.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease with acute lower respiratory infection (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: COPD with acute lower respiratory infection is a direct manifestation and complication of COPD.

scored_codes.term: Emphysema of left lung (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Emphysema of left lung is a clinical manifestation and subtype of COPD.

scored_codes.term: Emphysema of right lung (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Emphysema of right lung is a clinical manifestation and subtype of COPD.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive lung disease co-occurrent with acute bronchitis (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: COPD co-occurring with acute bronchitis represents a direct complication/manifestation of COPD.

scored_codes.term: End stage chronic obstructive airways disease (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: End stage COPD is a severity variant of COPD and should be included as a clinical subtype.

scored_codes.term: Giant bullous emphysema (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Giant bullous emphysema is a clinical manifestation and subtype of emphysema-related COPD.

scored_codes.term: Obstructive emphysema (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Obstructive emphysema is a clinical manifestation and subtype of COPD.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive bronchitis (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Chronic obstructive bronchitis is a clinical subtype and manifestation of COPD.

scored_codes.term: Mixed simple and mucopurulent chronic bronchitis (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Mixed simple and mucopurulent chronic bronchitis is a clinical subtype of COPD.

scored_codes.term: Chronic bullous emphysema (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Chronic bullous emphysema is a clinical manifestation and subtype of COPD.

scored_codes.rationale: Segmental bullous emphysema is a clinical manifestation and subtype of COPD.

scored_codes.term: Zonal bullous emphysema (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Zonal bullous emphysema is a clinical manifestation and subtype of COPD.

scored_codes.rationale: Chronic emphysema caused by chemical fumes is a clinical subtype of COPD with identified etiology.

scored_codes.term: Pulmonary emphysema in alpha-1 primary immunodeficiency deficiency (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Pulmonary emphysema in alpha-1 primary immunodeficiency is a clinical subtype of COPD with identified etiology.

scored_codes.term: Toxic emphysema (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Toxic emphysema is a clinical subtype of COPD with identified etiology.

scored_codes.rationale: Scar emphysema is a clinical subtype of COPD with identified etiology.

scored_codes.term: Vanishing lung (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Vanishing lung is a clinical manifestation and severe subtype of emphysema-related COPD.

scored_codes.term: Bullous emphysema with collapse (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Bullous emphysema with collapse is a clinical manifestation and complication of COPD.

scored_codes.term: Atrophic (senile) emphysema (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Atrophic (senile) emphysema is a clinical subtype of COPD.

scored_codes.term: Acute infective exacerbation of chronic obstructive airways disease (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Acute infective exacerbation of COPD is a direct manifestation of the underlying chronic obstructive pulmonary disease condition.

scored_codes.term: Acute exacerbation of chronic obstructive bronchitis (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Acute exacerbation of chronic obstructive bronchitis is a manifestation of COPD and confirms the patient has the condition.

scored_codes.term: Very severe chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Very severe COPD is a severity variant of the primary condition and should be included.

scored_codes.rationale: Mild COPD is a severity variant of the primary condition and should be included.

scored_codes.term: Moderate chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Moderate COPD is a severity variant of the primary condition and should be included.

scored_codes.rationale: Severe COPD is a severity variant of the primary condition and should be included.

scored_codes.term: Acute exacerbation of chronic bronchitis (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Acute exacerbation of chronic bronchitis is a manifestation of COPD and confirms the patient has the condition.

scored_codes.term: Chronic bronchitis (disorder)

scored_codes.rationale: Mucopurulent chronic bronchitis is a clinical subtype/manifestation of COPD and confirms the patient has the condition.

scored_codes.rationale: Acute non-infective exacerbation of COPD is a direct complication/manifestation of COPD and confirms the patient has the condition.

scored_codes.rationale: Asthma-COPD overlap syndrome is a recognized clinical entity where COPD is a primary component.

scored_codes.rationale: Asthma-COPD overlap syndrome (disorder) is a recognized clinical entity where COPD is a primary component.

scored_codes.rationale: Chronic tracheobronchitis is a manifestation of COPD and confirms the patient has the condition.

scored_codes.rationale: Chronic bronchitis with wheeze is a clinical manifestation/subtype of COPD and confirms the patient has the condition.

scored_codes.rationale: Panacinar emphysema is a pathological subtype that may be associated with COPD but could represent a distinct condition; clinical context needed.

scored_codes.term: Occupational bronchitis (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Occupational bronchitis may be a subtype or cause of COPD but could also be a distinct occupational disease; clinical context needed.

scored_codes.rationale: Centriacinar emphysema is a pathological subtype that may be associated with COPD but could represent a distinct condition; clinical context needed.

scored_codes.rationale: Paraseptal emphysema is a pathological subtype that may be associated with COPD but could also be a distinct condition; clinical context needed.

scored_codes.rationale: This code describes chronic obstructive asthma with acute exacerbation, which is primarily an asthma condition, not COPD.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease patient unsuitable for pulmonary rehabilitation (finding)
scored_codes.rationale: This is an administrative finding about suitability for rehabilitation, not a clinical confirmation of COPD itself.

scored_codes.term: Rheumatoid lung disease (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Rheumatoid lung disease is a distinct condition associated with rheumatoid arthritis, not a manifestation of primary COPD.

scored_codes.term: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease accident and emergency attendance since last visit
scored_codes.rationale: This is an administrative code tracking A&E attendance, not a clinical confirmation of COPD.

scored_codes.term: Congenital emphysema (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Congenital emphysema is a distinct congenital condition, not a manifestation of primary COPD.

scored_codes.term: Congenital lobar emphysema (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Congenital lobar emphysema is a distinct congenital condition, not a manifestation of primary COPD.

scored_codes.term: Change in chronic obstructive pulmonary disease management plan
scored_codes.rationale: This is an administrative code for management plan changes, not a clinical confirmation of COPD diagnosis.

scored_codes.term: Bronchial atresia with segmental pulmonary emphysema (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Bronchial atresia with segmental pulmonary emphysema is a congenital condition, not a manifestation of primary COPD.

scored_codes.term: Congenital lobar emphysema of bilateral lungs (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Congenital lobar emphysema is a congenital condition distinct from acquired COPD and should not be included in a primary COPD list.

scored_codes.term: Chronic asthma with fixed airflow obstruction
scored_codes.rationale: Chronic asthma with fixed airflow obstruction is primarily an asthma diagnosis; while it may overlap with COPD, it is a distinct condition and should not be included in a primary COPD list.

scored_codes.term: At risk of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease exacerbation
scored_codes.rationale: This is a risk assessment code, not a confirmation of COPD diagnosis; it indicates potential for exacerbation rather than the condition itself.

scored_codes.term: At increased risk of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease
scored_codes.rationale: This is a risk assessment code indicating increased risk, not a confirmation of COPD diagnosis.

scored_codes.term: Chronic allergic bronchitis
scored_codes.rationale: Chronic allergic bronchitis is primarily an allergic condition distinct from COPD, though it may co-occur.

scored_codes.term: Catarrhal bronchitis (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Catarrhal bronchitis is a non-obstructive form of chronic bronchitis and does not confirm COPD (which requires airflow obstruction).
